violations.text: Enfamil baby formula can was observed dented. FOOD packages shall be in good condition and protect the integrity of the contents so that the FOOD is not exposed to ADULTERATION or potential contaminants. Enfamil baby formula was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025

The loading dock door to the outside, located in the back stock room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025

Single-use articles (cake boxes) were observed stored on the floor in the bakery department. Single-use articles must be stored at least 6 inches off the ground. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/08/2024
